title: Ai trading Help
author: InsidersWin888
selftext:
A few years back I dipped my toes into crypto, but like many others I made some rookie mistakes chasing hype. Ended up losing around $3k on rug-pull coins and right than I walked away from the space completely. Honestly, it was discouraging and I felt like I’d just donated money to scammers.
Fast forward to now – I’ve been watching the market from the sidelines and can’t ignore how much has evolved, especially with AI. I’m really interested in exploring crypto trading with the help of AI agents/bots, but I don’t want to make the same mistakes again.
I’m not looking for “get rich quick” schemes, just solid advice, resources, or tools to learn how to do this the right way. Has anyone here experimented with AI-driven trading strategies or agents? What platforms, projects, or communities would you recommend for someone looking to get started carefully and avoid scams this time around?
Any guidance or even just pointing me in the right direction would mean a lot. Thanks in advance, and I’m hoping to turn my previous lesson into a smarter second attempt.

DMs encouraged.

comments.author: AcrobaticAd4202
comments.body:
Build a script, run through terminal and Python, add ccxt API keys from your platform of choice, add cat boost regressions, fine tune metrics with paper trading, when satisfied, deploy live with a small amount of capital and see where it takes you.
Good luck!

comments.author: StockMaster-AI
comments.body: So I get the thing with hype, it definitely burns you and the market humbles you fast. I’ve been trading more carefully and I think AI is getting really smart. I’ve been using daytradesignals.ai for a little over a month and it’s been surprisingly accurate, haven’t had a wrong signal yet. It made me realize I won’t be right all the time on my own, especially with emotions, so having an AI strategy has been nice. They also said crypto signals are coming soon which should be interesting. Website is daytradesignals.ai

comments.author: Legal_Ambition_5485
comments.body: Iknow a way to make 62$a month by just investing 100$ once with a ai trading bot & revolut if you interested text me

comments.author: RuiZz9299
comments.body: Man, I can totally relate to that — I lost a few grand on hype coins too and took a long break before coming back. The space’s changed a lot since then, especially with all the AI stuff popping up. If you’re exploring it again but want to stay careful, check out Minara. It’s not one of those “auto-trade” bots; it’s more like an AI research sidekick that helps you figure out *why* the market is moving — funding shifts, whale activity, on-chain flow, all that. You can literally ask “what’s driving BTC right now?” and it gives you a clean, data-backed breakdown. It’s helped me trade a lot more calmly without falling for hype again. Might be worth taking a look: minara
